content.title: Why Cất Cánh, and why you
content.pullquote: "You were chosen on purpose, not by chance."

content.title: A conversation with thế hệ đi trước

people.name: Dr. Loi Nguyen
people.role: EVP Emeritus, Optics, Marvell · Founding sponsor, Cất Cánh
creds: Co-Founder of Inphi, acquired by Marvell
Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering, Cornell · MBA, UCLA Anderson

people.name: Dr. Quang-Dam Le
people.role: General Director, Marvell Technology Vietnam · Founding sponsor
creds: Built Marvell Vietnam from 6 to 500+ engineers
20+ years abroad before returning home to Vietnam
Ph.D. in Signal Processing, focus on AI, Canada

people.name: Trần Mỹ Nghệ
people.role: R&D Engineer, advanced semiconductor chips · imec, Belgium
creds: More than 10 offers. A story of persistence

people.name: Trần Thị Bích Thủy
people.role: PhD candidate, Materials Science & Engineering, Li-ion batteries · Carnegie Mellon, USA
creds: Applied across Korea, the USA, and Taiwan in parallel

content.title: Your 6-month journey

phases.title: Find your direction
bullets: Choose target country and level (MS, PhD, or both)
Understand the systems (US, Taiwan, Korea, Japan, Europe)
Build a funding and scholarship strategy
phases.outcome: a direction report and a target list of schools, labs, and professors.

phases.title: Build your application
phases.body: Academic CV, SOP, self-introduction, interview prep, and presenting your research interest with confidence.
phases.outcome: CV and SOP drafts, which unlock your 1:1 matching.

notes: Office Hours and 1:1 with Ambassadors: book once you have a CV / SOP, a target list, and 3 to 5 specific questions.
Throughout: VISEMI tracks progress and coordinates workshops, deadlines, and Fellow-Ambassador matching.

content.title: How it works: roles and spirit

columns.heading: VISEMI Core Team
columns.body: Designs and coordinates the program; tracks progress; matches each Fellow with the right Ambassador.

columns.heading: Fellow
columns.body: The center of the program. Drives their own journey: attend workshops, submit on time, prepare CV / SOP / target list, book and follow up on 1:1s.

columns.heading: Ambassador
columns.body: Shares real experience; gives feedback on CV / SOP / cold emails and on choosing schools, labs, and professors; supports flexibly.

content.spirit: VISEMI coordinates · Fellow drives · Ambassador shares · Sponsor enables impact

content.title: We are taking off, together.
content.sub: Cameras on for our Day One photo
content.tagline: This is the first time the whole community is in one place. Smile, wave, and let us capture it.
